title: Ilex kingiana
intro: Ilex kingiana, also known as New Zealand Holly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aquifoliaceae, native to New Zealand. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, offering various health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may aid in reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and protecting against oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of Ilex kingiana include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Ilex kingiana is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as in formulations for skin care and wound healing due to its potential to promote tissue repair and reduce scarring.
